sentences.arabic: ذَهَبَتْ رِيمُ إِلَى الْمَطْبَخِ لِتَأْكُلَ قِطْعَةً مِنَ الْكَعْكَةِ.
sentences.translation: Rima je otišla u kuhinju da pojede komad torte.
sentences.translationEn: Rima went to the kitchen to eat a piece of cake.

sentences.arabic: لَكِنَّهَا لَمْ تَجِدِ الْكَعْكَةَ فِي مَكَانِهَا.
sentences.translation: Ali nije pronašla tortu na njenom mjestu.
sentences.translationEn: But she did not find the cake in its place.

sentences.translation: Pitala je brata: Jesi li pojeo tortu?
sentences.translationEn: She asked her brother: Did you eat the cake?

sentences.arabic: قَالَ الْأَخُ: لَا، لَكِنَّنِي رَأَيْتُ أَبَانَا يَحْمِلُ شَيْئًا.
sentences.translation: Brat je rekao: Ne, ali vidio sam oca kako nešto nosi.
sentences.translationEn: The brother said: No, but I saw our father carrying something.

sentences.arabic: اكْتَشَفَا أَنَّ الْأَبَ أَخَذَ الْكَعْكَةَ لِجِيرَانِهِمُ الْمَرْضَى.
sentences.translation: Otkrili su da je otac odneo tortu njihovim bolesnim komšijama.
sentences.translationEn: They discovered that the father took the cake to their sick neighbours.
